title: Aevium Create
description: Aevium Create enhances Create Minecraft with client-side mods for performance and quality of life.
body:
![Aevium Create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PWc1STEO/images/c198884e46c0d754e1e7475dd07e9a010d22c934.png)

# Aevium Create

**Aevium Create** is a mechanical-focused modpack built around the Minecraft Create Mod.  
It transforms vanilla gameplay into an engineering sandbox centered on automation, kinetic power, and large-scale factory building — while remaining optimized and multiplayer-friendly.

---

## ⚙️ Mechanical Innovation
- Full Create mod experience  
- Rotational power systems & kinetic machinery  
- Custom factories and moving contraptions  
- Automated farms and processing systems  
- Immersive mechanical crafting chains  

![Mechanical](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6211e048f26a57f0a822aade984e79b8cc23e8f.jpeg)

---

## 🏭 Automation & Engineering
- Conveyor belts, gears, and shafts  
- Functional train systems and rail networks  
- Advanced crafting automation  
- Expandable survival-friendly tech progression  
- Balanced for both singleplayer and servers  

![Automation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7dbaf9ad13caee75daa6cfda59832f81dcae444.jpeg)

---

## 🌍 Enhanced World & Exploration
- Improved terrain generation  
- Structures that complement industrial builds  
- Exploration integrated into progression  
- Factory-ready landscapes  

![World](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34579deb72f65f7c40750b7aed01f040f5a59c9c.jpeg)

---

## 🚀 Performance
- Optimized mod selection  
- Smooth gameplay and stable performance  
- Multiplayer-safe configuration  
- Designed for long-term worlds  

---

## 🧪 Beta
**Aevium Create** is currently in beta, with ongoing improvements and active development.

---

If you encounter any issues or bugs, please join the Discord.
